Name: apb_gpio.PWDATA
Description: Carries data values to be written into GPIO control registers (direction, output, interrupt enables/types, enables, pad configuration, lock).

Name: apb_gpio.PWRITE
Description: Indicates whether an APB access is a write versus a read, enabling state updates when asserted.

Name: apb_gpio.PENABLE
Description: Qualifies the second cycle of APB transfers to trigger the actual register access.

Name: apb_gpio.gpio_dir
Description: Drives each GPIO’s direction (input vs output) based on r_gpio_dir.

Name: apb_gpio.PSLVERR
Description: APB error indication signal (tied to 0 in this implementation).

Name: apb_gpio.PRDATA
Description: Returns register contents (direction, inputs, outputs, interrupt config/status, enable, lock, padcfg) on APB reads.

Name: apb_gpio.interrupt
Description: Aggregated interrupt line asserted when enabled and configured edges are detected on inputs.

Name: apb_gpio.r_gpio_en
Description: Per-pin enable bits used to derive s_clk_en for domain clock gating and to gate interrupt generation.
